itinerary.title: Arrival
itinerary.description: Seaplane transfer to your overwater villa. Welcome champagne and sunset viewing.

itinerary.title: Ocean Adventures
itinerary.description: Morning snorkeling at the house reef. Afternoon dolphin cruise.

itinerary.title: Wellness & Relaxation
itinerary.description: Sunrise yoga on the water. Couples spa journey. Underwater restaurant dinner.

itinerary.title: Island Hopping
itinerary.description: Visit local islands, enjoy a private beach picnic, and depart.

title: Maldives Paradise
description: The ultimate luxury escape. Overwater villas, private beaches, and crystal-clear waters in one of the world's most exclusive destinations.
